prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约32656→34723→35719→33690→45812，整体呈波动后移趋势，尤其2025年较2024年后移约12122名，出现明显跳升；2025年基准位次约45812名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年46人、2022年57人、2023年57人、2024年84人、2025年120人，呈持续扩招态势；2026年计划150人，较2025年再扩招30人（+25%），扩招幅度较大，对竞争格局有显著影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第113名→2026年第97名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度有所增强；2022年高考周期内因学校管理相关事件（郑强书记管理争议）出现偏负面声誉信号；抖音热度排名第63位（综合热度488520），评价为"一般"；未见明显投档断档记录，整体舆情平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；材料科学、工程学等学科实力较强，与招生专业中的材料科学与工程、化学工程与工艺等方向关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校理工科定位契合；广东省2026年物理类考生456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约15,792人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；太原理工大学位于山西省（非本省），在广东省无本地招生倾斜；该校在广东招生占比近年持续提升（2021年约3.5%→2025年约4.7%），但跨省报考受地域偏好影响，广东考生对省外211的报考热度相对平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅跳升的基准、2026年计划扩招25%的竞争稀释效应、广东省考生总数增加3.6%的竞争加剧、以及学校排名持续上升的吸引力增强，预计2026年最低位次在2025年45812名基础上进一步后移，预测最低位次约52884名，区间52384–53384名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 32656 → 34723 → 35719 → 33690 → 45812, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, especially in 2025, which shifted backward by about 12122 places compared to 2024, indicating a significant jump; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 45812; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category: 46 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 57 in 2023, 84 in 2024, 120 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 150, an additional 30 (+25%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Rankings have been rising continuously, from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there were negative reputation signals due to school management-related events (controversy over Secretary Zheng Qiang's management); Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd (comprehensive popularity 488520), rated as 'average'; no obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded, overall public opinion is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering are relatively strong, related to the enrollment majors like Materials Science and Engineering and Chemical Engineering and Technology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are consistently highly recommended in society, aligning with the university's science and engineering orientation; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, intensifying competition; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province (not local), with no local enrollment preference in Guangdong; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong has been increasing in recent years (about 3.5% in 2021 to about 4.7% in 2025), but cross-province applications are affected by regional preferences, with relatively stable enthusiasm among Guangdong candidates for out-of-province 211 universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking jump in 2025, the competitive dilution effect of a 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 3.6% increase in the total number of candidates in Guangdong, and the enhanced attractiveness from the university's rising rankings, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will further shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 45812, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 52884, ranging from 52384 to 53384.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 52384–53384, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Automation, Mechanical Engineering, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Civil Engineering, etc.) as safety choices. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, prioritize sprinting for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation.
